title: FFT Tracer
description: A live spectrum analyser off the microphone. Trace the FFT magnitude spectrum as a glowing filled curve, or a classic bar-graph analyser, with falling peak-hold caps on top. Log-frequency axis, resolution, gain, smoothing, mirror and hue are live. Click the mic to trace live audio — it idles on a synthetic spectrum until you do. (The scrolling spectrogram is now its own Waterfall sketch.)
